body_txt: When a character, usually female, gets made more (conventionally) attractive over the course of a show. Sometimes justified as the actions of puberty, when a younger character or actress starts filling out as they grow up. Buxom Beauty Standard is often at play. Named after what Microsoft calls its minor Windows upgrades, and, of course, Fanservice . (In fact, a service pack or patch is often used to pull this off in video games.) When this accompanies an increase in Action Girl -ness, it's an Adrenaline Makeover . Compare Beautiful All Along , Hidden Buxom , Progressively Prettier , and She Cleans Up Nicely , which is when this happens to characters who are initially not supposed to be considered attractive. Also compare Self-Fanservice , which is when fan-artists make their own Fanservice Packs. If done for an adaptation, it's Adaptational Attractiveness , or Adaptational Skimpiness if the main component is a more revealing costume. Contrast Girliness Upgrade . May involve a Significant Wardrobe Shift .
